title: Gear Fourth Awakens — Part 2
description: Luffy reveals Gear Fourth and overwhelms Doflamingo with a new form built to break the tyrant.
scene: On pages 9–13, Bartolomeo, Colosseum Fighters, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Doflamingo move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't be silly! I've just locked eyes with Dofla- Mingo...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Allow me to assist...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm entrusting the others to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: entrust - Faith _ Charisma popularity > Straw Hat's my fan!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WH... the request of a fan!? Then there's no way I can turn it down!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Bartolomeo should be on the level below us! Let's use his ability to get down there quick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How does it look, Leo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: The wound edges are extremely ragged! If only I could properly stitch the two back together...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If you do that, I should be able to heal it with my watering can!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: First things first! We must get down from here, like Lucy said!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oi! Bartolo- meo! Make a staircase with your barrier!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Jo... Jo... JORO-ZEN ...BAIII!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Are you even listen- ing, you idiot!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Just let it go already, Straw Hat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: law hasn't died yet. He's just suffering down there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The humane thing to do is put him to rest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If you wanna put him in the ground that badly then go ahead... but only over my dead body!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: It seems I'm already...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Halfway there then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: You're getting pretty weak your- self!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: You took trafficy's monster of an attack head on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: FwOosh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Bang Bang

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: There's no way it hasn't had an effect on you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Fufu Fufu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: You're fast, I'll give you that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: But your punches...it's like you're trying to tickle me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Overall.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Ah, the memories...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Croco- Dile's Been Defeated!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: by a marine HQ captain!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: They're lying. There's gotta be some- thing more.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Look! It's this guy... His bounty just shot up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Investigate this crew... I've never heard their name before.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Monkey D. !?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: And then, one day...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Guhh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: You fell from the sky, and the war of the greatest began!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: I truly am impressed you lived through all that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: And made your way here!

summary: This part focuses on gear fourth awakens, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
